title: Proclamation No. 489, s. 1965
text:
MALACAÑANG

RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES

PROCLAMATION NO. 489

EXCLUDING THE BAGUIO TOWNSITE RESERVATION SITUATION IN THE CITY OF BAGUIO CERTAIN PORTIONS OF THE LAND EMBRACED THEREIN AND RESERVING THE SAME FOR HOUSING PROJECT PURPOSES.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I, DIOSDADO MACAPAGAL, President of the Philippines, do hereby exclude from the Baguio Townsite Reservation, situated in the City of Baguio, certain portions of the land embraced therein and reserve the same for housing project purposes under the administration of the City Government of Baguio, subject to private rights, if any there be, which portions of land are more particularly described as follows:

Lot 1, Swo-40729, Sheet I (City of Baguio)

A parcel of land (the boundary of Lot 1 of plan Swo-40729, Sheet 1), situated in the Resident Selections “B”, “D” and “H”, City of Baguio.

Bounded on the NE., NW., SE., N. and E., along lines from corner 1 thence following the meandering boundary to corner 35, by Creek; on the SW., along line 35-36, by Public Land and along line 36-37, by Brend School (Lot 4, Rs-853); on the SW. SE. and SW., along lines 37-38-39-40-41-42-43, by Public Land; on the SW., along lines 43-44-45-46-47-48-49, by Honeymoon Road; on the W. and NW., along lines 49-50-51-52-53-54-55, by Rimando Road; and on the NE., along line 55-1, by Creek. Beginning ae a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 56 deg. 35’ E., 2,384.43 m. from Triangulation Center, City of Baguio,

thence N. 84 deg. 00’ E., 38.32 m. to point 2; thence S. 61 deg. 49’ E., 28.42 m. to point 3; thence S. 57 deg. 32’ E., 90.08 m. to poine 4; thence S. 67 deg. 39’ E., 50.46 m. to point 5; thence N. 35 deg. 45’ E., 65.27 m. to point 6 thence N. 2 deg. 45’ E., 44.00 m. to point 7;
